name: Grease
description: Nice Sandy (Olivia Newton-John) and greaser Danny (John Travolta) try to be like each other in their 1950s high school.

name: The Silence of the Lambs
description: An FBI trainee (Jodie Foster) seeks advice from a brilliant, psychopathic prisoner (Anthony Hopkins) to catch a killer who skins his victims.

name: The Big Lebowski
description: Bowling buddies become involved with a multimillionaire and his family wanted by mobsters in 1990s Los Angeles.

name: The Martian
description: Left behind by his crew, a stranded astronaut must find a way to survive on Mars, while NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home.

name: Meet the Press
description: Interviews with public figures and those making news, setting the political agenda and spotlighting the impact Washington decision-making has on Americans.

name: Atlanta Braves at Philadelphia Phillies
description: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

name: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
description: A swashbuckler (Johnny Depp) must rescue a governor's daughter (Keira Knightley) from a pirate (Geoffrey Rush) and his mates, who turn into skeletons by moonlight.

name: To Philly with Love

description: Rachel throws Emily a phony going-away party so she can see Joshua outside of work, and pregnant Phoebe craves meat.
